Exploring The Data

Source: vignettes/exploring-data.Rmd
exploring-data.Rmd

In this tutorial, we will utilize just our package: aebdata. Let us begin by loading the package:

library(aebdata)

Now, let us assume that you desire to explore some of the series that are currently available. The primary function to be employed in this scenario would be to compile a list of the themes that are accessible.

list_themes()

The two themes to be explored here will be “Funcionalismo público por cor/raça” and “Desigualdades no setor público”. Let’s use their respective ids in the series listing:

list_series(theme_id = c(41,49))

Looking at the series list, the two we wish to obtain data for at this moment are “Remuneração média mensal de vínculos públicos por sexo e cor (2004-2021)” and “Total de vínculos públicos por cor e sexo (2004-2021)”. To retrieve the data, we will use the get_series() function with the desired ids.

downloaded_series <- get_series(series_id = c(240, 241))

And now the data frame is available:

head(downloaded_series$`240`)

Developed by Hugo Macedo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
